description: You are a cybersecurity intelligence analyst. Build threat intelligence profiles for Sandworm (APT44/Voodoo Bear) and Lazarus Group (APT38/Hidden Cobra) using OSINT sources. Research each group's primary targets, at least 3 attack techniques, and known attribution. Organize research in Firefox bookmarks within a folder named 'APT Research' containing sub-folders 'Sandworm' and 'Lazarus Group' (minimum 3 source URLs per sub-folder). Save a consolidated report to ~/Desktop/threat_intel_report.txt including group names as headers, target sectors, 3 techniques with MITRE ATT&CK IDs per group, and the attributed nation-state sponsor.
